titleStmt.title: SII 26.298: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 298. (A.R. No. 283 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍān, Kulōttuṅga III (?) Year 36 = 1213-14 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift made by the king of 48 vēli of land in Śeṅguṉṟam alias Arumoḻidēvanallūr in Śeṅguṉṟa-nāḍu in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, and 67 vēli of land in Vellāḷa Maḍaiyār Puḷḷiyam in Valla-nāḍu as dēvadāna iṟaiyili to the temple of the same deity in the same Tirukkachchūr occurring in No. 297 above, to provide for offerings to the deity therein. The gift was made on the request of Chēdiyarāyaṉ. The signatories were Irāsanārāyaṇa Mūvēnda-vēḷāṉ, who was the tirumandira-ōlai, Pallavarāyaṉ, Viḻiṇattaraiyaṉ, Toṇḍaimāṉ, Śiddharāyaṉ, Chēdikularāyaṉ, Śiṅgarāyaṉ, Aṅgarāyaṉ, Vijayarāyaṉ and Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu kaḷattūr ko
ṭṭattu ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyāṟ koyiliṟ tevakaṉmikkum śrīmā
heśvarakaṇkāṇi cevārkaḷukku śrīkāriyañceyvāṉūkkum Ittevarkku veṇṭum nilan taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatā
ka Iṉṉāṭṭuc ceṅkuṉṟamāṉa Arumoḻitevanallūrile nāṟpatteṇ veli nilamum vallanāṭṭu ve
ḷḷāḷa maṭaiyār puḷḷiyam nilam Arupattu Eḻuveliyum muppattu Āṟāvatu picāṉa mutal Antarāyam
pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āka vikkaṭavatāka peṟaveṇumeṉṟu ceti yarāyaṉ namakku coṉṉamai
yil Ippaṭi ceyakkaṭavatākac colli kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikku kūṟu cevārkaḷukkum coṉ
ṉom Inilam muppattu Āṟāvatu picāṉamutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Ittevarkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Ākak ko
ṇṭu nivaṉtañ celutta paṇuka Eḻutiṉa tirumantiraolai Irācanārāyaṇa muventa veḷāṉ Ivai pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻi
ṇattaraiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu Ivai cittarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai cetikularāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai ciṅkarā
yaṉeḻuttu Ivai kāṭavarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai vicaiya rāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai nilakaṅka
raiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
